TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mila'dis 海祭 == O Amizuku nu "海祭"hananay, itini i saamisan hananay a Pangcah 〝miladis〞 han, ,itini i海岸阿美nika sumuwal i〝 misacepo'〞han, anu Farangaw a tamdaw nika sumuwal i 〝mikesi'〞han, anu sipakayni i 花蓮縣豐濱鄉港口a niyaro a nika sumuwal i ,pakayni cudad nuheny i 海祭sananay, itiya maruay itiya i 南洋hananay a Pangcahay a tamdaw,napalilu tu misangay tu kakaenen a kawas,napalasawad kina tamdaw sisa kinapatay hantu kina tamdaw. Ira kya malakakaay a tatusa, madiput nu liyal,tahkalsa kuheny itini i Tawan hananay,dengaysa kita a sikakawsantu kita tu dayday nu wawa nu mita saan,yatatusaan i malalikid tani i liyal. Niyan a tatusaan i, ungangasawan nu Amis kina tatusaan,amangalay kuheni a makasimsim tu pakaoripay tuheniyan a kawas,a patudung kita tu kawas nu liyal saan. Teparay nu liyal ku niyaro' paoripan nu mita saan, misanga' kita tu sapila'dis a demak saan,manay sikakawaw tu la'dis. Taluma' kita tu mibuting yu nilunansa,kina cacay kuni simsim nina Pangcah sanay.anu lutuk kina kaenen nu mita i, anu lutuk sikapaorip numita saan, pasuelin kuheni tina akakawaw. Mitanengay kuheni nika sakaorip,amala kaputkaput kita saan, kumuden numita ku sakaurip sananay ku ruma, anu tahekalay i liyalai i ,u masakapahay ya maemin i, katayni maemin a malacapu' sananay a demak, atahkal ku matuasay pabana' tu sapibuting a kilsu sananay. U mikaputay itini la'dis hananay, pakayni tu nika malasacapu' sa, ira ku matuasay, ira ku terungay kaorip, ira ku sining, aka:aw picumud ku babahi, aka pingatangata aca amilecapu tiniyan babainayan a demak saan. U mila'dis tuayaw a rumiad i, malingatu a mibuting ,kiya asapisalisin nu mita kyakawas nu liyal satu kuhni, maharek sa a patata i, pakaenhan nu mita tu pinaulan sa. Iraaca ku ruma nipisuwal tu nikalaedisan,Umi laedis hananay umibutingay,sakatataangay a demak itini i pilisinan,sapakayni a mabana' tu kakawaw nu mita' Pangcah hananay,sapakaynai a mabana' ku kapahay a sining tu sapibuting,sapaorip tu luma'ay a tamdaw. Tayni ku kapahay i sasa'wacan nu liyal,mikilim tu sapisanga' tu sapakaen tu kawas a bekeluh. O sikawasay ku mipih'pih'hay,patudung tu kakaenen nu kawas,ngalay ira ko sakapahay a nibutingan. Hareksa kuna lisin,tya malecabaycabaysa a malingad a talaliyal a imputing. Tuluay a rumiad a mila'dis,aka picumud ko babahiyan,aka kakaen ko kapahay tunu ruma'ay a kakaenen,omipananamay tu saka paorip tu luma nuheni. Pakany kaku a mabana' tu sakaorip nu mita o Amis hananay,nanay simsimen numita ko nika orip numita,sakilemelen nu mita a patireng tu suwal nu malitengay,kawkawhan pasebana' tu wawa nu mita saan.
S.PHON: == miɾaʡɬ~ɮis ** == o~u ami*o~u~uko~u~u no~u~u "**"ħananaj, itini i saamisan ħananaj a paŋʦaħ *miɾaɬ~ɮis* ħan, ,itini i****nika so~u~umo~u~uwaɾ i* misaʦəpo~uʡ*ħan, ano~u~u faraŋaw a tamɬ~ɮaw nika so~u~umo~u~uwaɾ i *mikəsiʡ*ħan, ano~u~u sipakajni i ********a nijaro~u a nika so~u~umo~u~uwaɾ i ,pakajni ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u~uħənj i **sananaj, itija maro~u~uaj itija i **ħananaj a paŋʦaħaj a tamɬ~ɮaw,napaɾiɾo~u~u to~u~u misaŋaj to~u~u kakaənən a kawas,napaɾasawaɬ~ɮ kina tamɬ~ɮaw sisa kinapataj ħanto~u~u kina tamɬ~ɮaw. ira kja maɾakakaaj a tato~u~usa, maɬ~ɮipo~u~ut no~u~u ɾijaɾ,taħkaɾsa ko~u~uħənj itini i tawan ħananaj,ɬ~ɮəŋajsa kita a sikakawsanto~u~u kita to~u~u ɬ~ɮajɬ~ɮaj no~u~u wawa no~u~u mita saan,jatato~u~usaan i maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ tani i ɾijaɾ. nijan a tato~u~usaan i, o~u~uŋaŋasawan no~u~u amis kina tato~u~usaan,amaŋaɾaj ko~u~uħəni a makasimsim to~u~u pakao~uripaj to~u~uħənijan a kawas,a pato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ kita to~u~u kawas no~u~u ɾijaɾ saan. təparaj no~u~u ɾijaɾ ko~u~u nijaro~uʡ pao~uripan no~u~u mita saan, misaŋaʡ kita to~u~u sapiɾaʡɬ~ɮis a ɬ~ɮəmak saan,manaj sikakawaw to~u~u ɾaʡɬ~ɮis. taɾo~u~umaʡ kita to~u~u mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ jo~u~u niɾo~u~unansa,kina ʦaʦaj ko~u~uni simsim nina paŋʦaħ sanaj.ano~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk kina kaənən no~u~u mita i, ano~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk sikapao~urip no~u~umita saan, paso~u~uəɾin ko~u~uħəni tina akakawaw. mitanəŋaj ko~u~uħəni nika sakao~urip,amaɾa kapo~u~utkapo~u~ut kita saan, ko~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮən no~u~umita ko~u~u sakao~u~urip sananaj ko~u~u ro~u~uma, ano~u~u taħəkaɾaj i ɾijaɾai i ,o~u~u masakapaħaj ja maəmin i, katajni maəmin a maɾaʦapo~u~uʡ sananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ataħkaɾ ko~u~u mato~u~uasaj pab~b~vanaʡ to~u~u sapib~b~vo~u~utiŋ a kiɾso~u~u sananaj. o~u~u mikapo~u~utaj itini ɾaʡɬ~ɮis ħananaj, pakajni to~u~u nika maɾasaʦapo~u~uʡ sa, ira ko~u~u mato~u~uasaj, ira ko~u~u təro~u~uŋaj kao~urip, ira ko~u~u siniŋ, aka:aw piʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, aka piŋataŋata aʦa amiɾəʦapo~u~u tinijan b~b~vab~b~vainajan a ɬ~ɮəmak saan. o~u~u miɾaʡɬ~ɮis to~u~uajaw a ro~u~umiaɬ~ɮ i, maɾiŋato~u~u a mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ ,kija asapisaɾisin no~u~u mita kjakawas no~u~u ɾijaɾ sato~u~u ko~u~uħni, maħarək sa a patata i, pakaənħan no~u~u mita to~u~u pinao~u~uɾan sa. iraaʦa ko~u~u ro~u~uma nipiso~u~uwaɾ to~u~u nikaɾaəɬ~ɮisan,o~u~umi ɾaəɬ~ɮis ħananaj o~u~umib~b~vo~u~utiŋaj,sakatataaŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak itini i piɾisinan,sapakajni a mab~b~vanaʡ to~u~u kakawaw no~u~u mitaʡ paŋʦaħ ħananaj,sapakajnai a mab~b~vanaʡ ko~u~u kapaħaj a siniŋ to~u~u sapib~b~vo~u~utiŋ,sapao~urip to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. tajni ko~u~u kapaħaj i sasaʡwaʦan no~u~u ɾijaɾ,mikiɾim to~u~u sapisaŋaʡ to~u~u sapakaən to~u~u kawas a b~b~vəkəɾo~u~uħ. o~u sikawasaj ko~u~u mipiħʡpiħʡħaj,pato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u kakaənən no~u~u kawas,ŋaɾaj ira ko~u sakapaħaj a nib~b~vo~u~utiŋan. ħarəksa ko~u~una ɾisin,tja maɾəʦab~b~vajʦab~b~vajsa a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ a taɾaɾijaɾ a impo~u~utiŋ. to~u~uɾo~u~uaj a ro~u~umiaɬ~ɮ a miɾaʡɬ~ɮis,aka piʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ ko~u b~b~vab~b~vaħijan,aka kakaən ko~u kapaħaj to~u~uno~u~u ro~u~umaʡaj a kakaənən,o~umipananamaj to~u~u saka pao~urip to~u~u ɾo~u~uma no~u~uħəni. pakanj kako~u~u a mab~b~vanaʡ to~u~u sakao~urip no~u~u mita o~u amis ħananaj,nanaj simsimən no~u~umita ko~u nika o~urip no~u~umita,sakiɾəməɾən no~u~u mita a patirəŋ to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u maɾitəŋaj,kawkawħan pasəb~b~vanaʡ to~u~u wawa no~u~u mita saan.
S.FORM: == Mila'dis 海祭 == O Amizuku nu "海祭"hananay, itini i saamisan hananay a Pangcah 〝miladis〞 han, ,itini i海岸阿美nika sumuwal i〝 misacepo'〞han, anu Farangaw a tamdaw nika sumuwal i 〝mikesi'〞han, anu sipakayni i 花蓮縣豐濱鄉港口a niyaro a nika sumuwal i ,pakayni cudad nuheny i 海祭sananay, itiya maruay itiya i 南洋hananay a Pangcahay a tamdaw,napalilu tu misangay tu kakaenen a kawas,napalasawad kina tamdaw sisa kinapatay hantu kina tamdaw. Ira kya malakakaay a tatusa, madiput nu liyal,tahkalsa kuheny itini i Tawan hananay,dengaysa kita a sikakawsantu kita tu dayday nu wawa nu mita saan,yatatusaan i malalikid tani i liyal. Niyan a tatusaan i, ungangasawan nu Amis kina tatusaan,amangalay kuheni a makasimsim tu pakaoripay tuheniyan a kawas,a patudung kita tu kawas nu liyal saan. Teparay nu liyal ku niyaro' paoripan nu mita saan, misanga' kita tu sapila'dis a demak saan,manay sikakawaw tu la'dis. Taluma' kita tu mibuting yu nilunansa,kina cacay kuni simsim nina Pangcah sanay.anu lutuk kina kaenen nu mita i, anu lutuk sikapaorip numita saan, pasuelin kuheni tina akakawaw. Mitanengay kuheni nika sakaorip,amala kaputkaput kita saan, kumuden numita ku sakaurip sananay ku ruma, anu tahekalay i liyalai i ,u masakapahay ya maemin i, katayni maemin a malacapu' sananay a demak, atahkal ku matuasay pabana' tu sapibuting a kilsu sananay. U mikaputay itini la'dis hananay, pakayni tu nika malasacapu' sa, ira ku matuasay, ira ku terungay kaorip, ira ku sining, aka:aw picumud ku babahi, aka pingatangata aca amilecapu tiniyan babainayan a demak saan. U mila'dis tuayaw a rumiad i, malingatu a mibuting ,kiya asapisalisin nu mita kyakawas nu liyal satu kuhni, maharek sa a patata i, pakaenhan nu mita tu pinaulan sa. Iraaca ku ruma nipisuwal tu nikalaedisan,Umi laedis hananay umibutingay,sakatataangay a demak itini i pilisinan,sapakayni a mabana' tu kakawaw nu mita' Pangcah hananay,sapakaynai a mabana' ku kapahay a sining tu sapibuting,sapaorip tu luma'ay a tamdaw. Tayni ku kapahay i sasa'wacan nu liyal,mikilim tu sapisanga' tu sapakaen tu kawas a bekeluh. O sikawasay ku mipih'pih'hay,patudung tu kakaenen nu kawas,ngalay ira ko sakapahay a nibutingan. Hareksa kuna lisin,tya malecabaycabaysa a malingad a talaliyal a imputing. Tuluay a rumiad a mila'dis,aka picumud ko babahiyan,aka kakaen ko kapahay tunu ruma'ay a kakaenen,omipananamay tu saka paorip tu luma nuheni. Pakany kaku a mabana' tu sakaorip nu mita o Amis hananay,nanay simsimen numita ko nika orip numita,sakilemelen nu mita a patireng tu suwal nu malitengay,kawkawhan pasebana' tu wawa nu mita saan.
S.PHON: == miɾaʡɬ~ɮis ** == o~u ami*o~u~uko~u~u no~u~u "**"ħananaj, itini i saamisan ħananaj a paŋʦaħ *miɾaɬ~ɮis* ħan, ,itini i****nika so~u~umo~u~uwaɾ i* misaʦəpo~uʡ*ħan, ano~u~u faraŋaw a tamɬ~ɮaw nika so~u~umo~u~uwaɾ i *mikəsiʡ*ħan, ano~u~u sipakajni i ********a nijaro~u a nika so~u~umo~u~uwaɾ i ,pakajni ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ no~u~uħənj i **sananaj, itija maro~u~uaj itija i **ħananaj a paŋʦaħaj a tamɬ~ɮaw,napaɾiɾo~u~u to~u~u misaŋaj to~u~u kakaənən a kawas,napaɾasawaɬ~ɮ kina tamɬ~ɮaw sisa kinapataj ħanto~u~u kina tamɬ~ɮaw. ira kja maɾakakaaj a tato~u~usa, maɬ~ɮipo~u~ut no~u~u ɾijaɾ,taħkaɾsa ko~u~uħənj itini i tawan ħananaj,ɬ~ɮəŋajsa kita a sikakawsanto~u~u kita to~u~u ɬ~ɮajɬ~ɮaj no~u~u wawa no~u~u mita saan,jatato~u~usaan i maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ tani i ɾijaɾ. nijan a tato~u~usaan i, o~u~uŋaŋasawan no~u~u amis kina tato~u~usaan,amaŋaɾaj ko~u~uħəni a makasimsim to~u~u pakao~uripaj to~u~uħənijan a kawas,a pato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ kita to~u~u kawas no~u~u ɾijaɾ saan. təparaj no~u~u ɾijaɾ ko~u~u nijaro~uʡ pao~uripan no~u~u mita saan, misaŋaʡ kita to~u~u sapiɾaʡɬ~ɮis a ɬ~ɮəmak saan,manaj sikakawaw to~u~u ɾaʡɬ~ɮis. taɾo~u~umaʡ kita to~u~u mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ jo~u~u niɾo~u~unansa,kina ʦaʦaj ko~u~uni simsim nina paŋʦaħ sanaj.ano~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk kina kaənən no~u~u mita i, ano~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk sikapao~urip no~u~umita saan, paso~u~uəɾin ko~u~uħəni tina akakawaw. mitanəŋaj ko~u~uħəni nika sakao~urip,amaɾa kapo~u~utkapo~u~ut kita saan, ko~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮən no~u~umita ko~u~u sakao~u~urip sananaj ko~u~u ro~u~uma, ano~u~u taħəkaɾaj i ɾijaɾai i ,o~u~u masakapaħaj ja maəmin i, katajni maəmin a maɾaʦapo~u~uʡ sananaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, ataħkaɾ ko~u~u mato~u~uasaj pab~b~vanaʡ to~u~u sapib~b~vo~u~utiŋ a kiɾso~u~u sananaj. o~u~u mikapo~u~utaj itini ɾaʡɬ~ɮis ħananaj, pakajni to~u~u nika maɾasaʦapo~u~uʡ sa, ira ko~u~u mato~u~uasaj, ira ko~u~u təro~u~uŋaj kao~urip, ira ko~u~u siniŋ, aka:aw piʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ ko~u~u b~b~vab~b~vaħi, aka piŋataŋata aʦa amiɾəʦapo~u~u tinijan b~b~vab~b~vainajan a ɬ~ɮəmak saan. o~u~u miɾaʡɬ~ɮis to~u~uajaw a ro~u~umiaɬ~ɮ i, maɾiŋato~u~u a mib~b~vo~u~utiŋ ,kija asapisaɾisin no~u~u mita kjakawas no~u~u ɾijaɾ sato~u~u ko~u~uħni, maħarək sa a patata i, pakaənħan no~u~u mita to~u~u pinao~u~uɾan sa. iraaʦa ko~u~u ro~u~uma nipiso~u~uwaɾ to~u~u nikaɾaəɬ~ɮisan,o~u~umi ɾaəɬ~ɮis ħananaj o~u~umib~b~vo~u~utiŋaj,sakatataaŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak itini i piɾisinan,sapakajni a mab~b~vanaʡ to~u~u kakawaw no~u~u mitaʡ paŋʦaħ ħananaj,sapakajnai a mab~b~vanaʡ ko~u~u kapaħaj a siniŋ to~u~u sapib~b~vo~u~utiŋ,sapao~urip to~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. tajni ko~u~u kapaħaj i sasaʡwaʦan no~u~u ɾijaɾ,mikiɾim to~u~u sapisaŋaʡ to~u~u sapakaən to~u~u kawas a b~b~vəkəɾo~u~uħ. o~u sikawasaj ko~u~u mipiħʡpiħʡħaj,pato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ to~u~u kakaənən no~u~u kawas,ŋaɾaj ira ko~u sakapaħaj a nib~b~vo~u~utiŋan. ħarəksa ko~u~una ɾisin,tja maɾəʦab~b~vajʦab~b~vajsa a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ a taɾaɾijaɾ a impo~u~utiŋ. to~u~uɾo~u~uaj a ro~u~umiaɬ~ɮ a miɾaʡɬ~ɮis,aka piʦo~u~umo~u~uɬ~ɮ ko~u b~b~vab~b~vaħijan,aka kakaən ko~u kapaħaj to~u~uno~u~u ro~u~umaʡaj a kakaənən,o~umipananamaj to~u~u saka pao~urip to~u~u ɾo~u~uma no~u~uħəni. pakanj kako~u~u a mab~b~vanaʡ to~u~u sakao~urip no~u~u mita o~u amis ħananaj,nanaj simsimən no~u~umita ko~u nika o~urip no~u~umita,sakiɾəməɾən no~u~u mita a patirəŋ to~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u maɾitəŋaj,kawkawħan pasəb~b~vanaʡ to~u~u wawa no~u~u mita saan.
